  • 💛 Choose Your Impact

The Beyond BARS Program

A trauma-informed 90-day reentry coaching program for system-impacted women choosing sobriety and stability.

Beyond BARS Coaching Reentry Program

Your program combines your Calendar, Email, and Text applications. Here, you will find your tasks, events, and program resources to support you in creating a life with purpose and direction.

Each week, you will have tasks to complete that align with your education and career goals.

What's Included:

  • Tailored Sober Rebel Plan — revised every 12 weeks
  • 1:1 Coaching Calls
  • Text-based Laser Coaching in between our calls (lots of magic happens here!)
  • Community Events online and IRL!

Beyond BARS Workbook/Planner

The workbook thoughtfully organizes 12-weeks worth of content to guide you through a smooth transition back into society. There is one coaching exercise per month and a complete 12-week planner, including monthly and weekly layouts, plus bonus resources to support mental resilience and mobility.

🙋 Frequently Asked Questions

Can't find an answer? Email vanessa.ragains@gmail.com

What is your role as my Coach?

As a certified Health & Life Coach (please see my LinkedIn profile for all of my completed certifications) I have trained in behavior change, health education, motivational strategies, and more to support you in creating sustained change that improves your holistic health and wellbeing.

As Your Coach I will:

  • Help you identify your health goals and align them with your values.
  • Create a strong sense of accountability, which is scientifically proven to promote success.
  • Tailor the right amount of support and resources to your specific goals (F.A.S.T. Method).
  • Help you become the healthiest version of YOU!
What are the benefits of working with you?

When I came home from my last group home, I thought the transition back to my family would be easy. Through all these experiences, I learned valuable lessons about creating structure and stability in my life. Now, as part of my Beyond BARS Coaching program, I want to share the strategies that helped me build resilience and maintain a sense of direction during uncertain times.

Benefits of applying for this program:

  • CLARIFY YOUR GOALS: Receive a personalized, step-by-step Sober Rebel Plan that integrates your education & career journey, while maintaining a strong, authentic LinkedIn profile that reflects your growth and goals.
  • HONOR THE 3 PILLARS: You'll build supportive goals across Nourishment, Self-Care, and Personal Development—the three pillars that ground our work and create sustainable progress.
  • CULTIVATE HEALTHY MOBILITY: Through a thoughtful blend of herbal wellness and trauma-informed yoga, you'll develop a mobility practice that restores movement, supports nervous-system regulation, and helps your body feel safer, steadier, and more resilient.
How will my health and wellness improve working with you?

Here are 3 ways your Health & Wellness will improve working with me:

  • We revise your Sober Rebel Plan every 12-weeks and can utilize the text-based Coaching between our calls in the Skool community. That's where the magic happens!
  • I offer the right Foundation, Accountability, Support, and Tools to help you follow through on your health & wellness goals. AKA the F.A.S.T. Method.
  • I am a human who is passionate about how we heal our bodies. Not only are you working with a certified Life Coach, but a Herbalist and Yoga Teacher (RYT-500). I retired from my Massage Therapy career and have a solid understanding of how the body works. All of the education I have invested in has led me to this opportunity to share over 2 decades of holistic knowledge.
What does the structure of the Coaching program look like?

I primarily work with system-impacted women after they have been released. I also created a workbook to work through if you are still incarcerated, in rehab, or in group homes.

Your program combines your Calendar, Email, and Text applications. Here, you will find your tasks, events, and program resources to support you in creating a life with purpose and direction.

What's Included:

  • Tailored Sober Rebel Plan — revised every 12-weeks
  • 1:1 Coaching Calls
  • Text-based Laser Coaching in between our calls
  • Community Events online and IRL!
I'd like more details about how the donations work.

Each Sober Rebel will be sponsored by generous donations from people like you who believe in this cause. Your support will not only transform the lives of these individuals but also contribute to keeping the workbooks printed and accessible to system-impacted women as they are released from incarceration, rehab, or group homes. These donations support our daily operations and are vital to our mission!

For questions, please email me at vanessa.ragains@gmail.com. Thank you for your generous donations!

What does BARS stand for?
  • B — Behavior Change
  • A — Action
  • R — Resilience
  • S — Sobriety
See Program Details & Register

Supporting alcohol-free women in rebuilding safety, self-trust, and stability.

🏡 Beyond BARS Coaching, 501(c)(3), #33-1514564
